name: Festive Beef Fillets
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the gravy according to package directions.
2. Add the mushrooms and horseradish to the gravy.
3. Set aside and keep warm.
4. In a non-stick skillet, cook the fillets over medium-high heat until the meat reaches the desired doneness (about 10 to 13 minutes for medium).
5. Turn the fillets once during cooking.
6. Season with pepper.
7. Serve with the gravy.
